problem_statement: GitFix suggestions were generated without first replaying the canonical README surfaces supplied by the user.

observed_doctrine: Build simple, honest systems that can be read, replayed, and verified.
No fake green. No random noise. Start clean.
Receipts prove process only. Receipts do not prove truth or grant authority.
REPLAY_MANIFEST_V0_1.json defines canonical entrypoints and policies.
Replay verifies. GitHub contextualizes. EAS witnesses. ENS discovers.
GitHub pointer is not a truth surface.
CI success and replay success do not imply authority.
No receipt, no authority. No replay, no promotion.
Public GitHub artifacts are evidence. Narrative is not evidence. No fake green.
JOY records semantic continuity; ReceiptOS verifies; AL consumes verified artifacts.
Stories are allowed. Fabrication is not. Authority remains false.
A candidate remains blocked until verification.
Clone it. Replay it. Match the root or show the divergence.
Same ordered fixture plus same canonicalization equals same root.
Both root match and divergence produce knowledge. Neither requires belief.

forbidden_shortcuts: promote CI or merge to authority

replay_contract.match: Suggestion is consistent with observed README doctrine and exact inspected files.
replay_contract.diverge: Suggestion conflicts with doctrine, uses an uninspected path, or relies on memory instead of repository evidence.
replay_contract.on_diverge: Stop promotion, expose divergence, and repair from repository bytes.
